CONTENT.Career: Doucouré is a youth product of the academies of Paris FC and Châteauroux. On 9 June 2020, he signed his first professional contract with Châteauroux. He made his professional debut with Châteauroux in a 1–0 Ligue 2 loss to Valenciennes on 12 September 2020. On 1 September 2022, he transferred to Lorient in the Ligue 1 on a 4-year contract.On 1 February 2024, Doucouré was loaned by Valenciennes.
CONTENT.Personal life: Doucouré was born in Nogent-sur-Marne, France. He holds French and Malian nationalities.
CONTENT.International career: Doucouré was included in the Mali national football team for the 2023 Africa Cup of Nations.

SUMMARY: Siriné Ckene Doucouré (born 8 April 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for  Championnat National club Valenciennes, on loan from  Ligue 2 club Lorient. Born in France, he represents Mali national football team.
